case_title: DOLORES LEANN VENEGAS VS. ADRIAN ALVAREZ-MONTES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY VENEGAS, DOLORES LEANN AS TO DEFENDANT ALVAREZ-MONTES, ADRIAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-06-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (2 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF VENEGAS, DOLORES LEANN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-06-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-06-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-06-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VENEGAS, DOLORES LEANN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ALVAREZ-MONTES, ADRIAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
